hero.subtitle: Speaker · Author · Founder
hero.description: Guiding women to live from their essence, with purpose, faith, and integral well-being.

about.label: ABOUT ME
about.title: My purpose was activated before I was born
about.p1: During my mother's pregnancy, my parents — young and confused — were already at a clinic making a decision about the pregnancy, when something greater than them gave them peace to welcome their third daughter.
about.p1before: During my mother's pregnancy, my parents — young and confused — were already at a clinic making a decision about the pregnancy, when
about.p1highlight: something greater than them gave them peace to welcome their third daughter.
about.p2: That moment changed my destiny. I call it my first spiritual battle — between human logic and divine design. I am living proof that purpose is activated before birth. Today I walk with women to discover that everything begins within — in the restoration of the spirit, the healing of the soul, and the intentional care of the body.
about.p3before: I deeply believe that true transformation happens when a woman realigns herself with
about.p3highlight: the divine design for which she was created.
about.p3after: That conviction became the heart of my purpose.

items.title: Pure Water
items.desc: We help reduce unwanted elements like chlorine, sediment and heavy metals to give you cleaner, more reliable water.

items.title: 24/7 Protection
items.desc: Our systems work continuously to protect your home and family at all times.

items.title: Family-Focused
items.desc: Because the water your home uses is also part of caring for those you love.

items.title: Alkaline

items.title: Puronics RO
items.desc: High-quality reverse osmosis system. Reduces up to 99% of impurities in your water.

items.title: Puronics Home
items.desc: Protect your entire home — softened and filtered water at every tap, shower and appliance.

items.desc: Certified technicians who install correctly from day one.
